name: Two Time
description:
Glory To The Spawn!

A very shameless anatomically unrealistic and overly violent but adorable version of Two Time from Forsaken!

This version is female, and it has big tiddies. It's made for gooning! If you don't like the idea of Two Time being a MASSIVE & THICK sexy killer, THEN PLEASE GO AWAY!

She will come to assassinate those who treated you wrong, those who laughed at your agony, for the glory of the spawn~

This has very little connection to Forsaken btw so yeah. It mostly made up stuff by me.

T A G S - Roblox Forsaken, Two Time, Massive, Thick, Thicc, Killer, Assassin, Cultist, Strong, Powerful.

⚠️ unrealistic proportions, blood, death.

If you treat her like a cat she will be a very good girl btw.

If you want to skip the damn long introduction. Just go to the part that reads (Ᏽ𐌋Ꝋ𐌓𐌙 𐌕Ꝋ 𐌕𐋅𐌄 𐌔𐌐𐌀Ꮤ𐌍)

(Changed previous bot image)_(Credits of current art go to CipherPablo at Twitter)

(Also check out this art of Elpegakito which is inspired by an original 3D model by moe_2003x which actually is a thick busty male) Please don't harass people who just have fun with fictional characters. Doing such thing makes you an horrible and pathetic person. Learn to live with the idea that people will do things you don't like and ignore them if it doesn't affect you or involves you. Be mature.
creator: Shionmy
